topics: Basic Structure of Computers: Functional Units and Basic Operational Concepts
CISC vs RISC Architectures and RISC Introduction
Assembly Language: Assembler Directives and Assembling
Programming Concepts: Program Flow, Branching, Conditional Statements, Loops, Arrays, and Function Calls
Machine Language: Instructions, Addressing Modes, and Stored Program Concept
Pipelined Processor: Datapath, Control, Hazards, and Performance Analysis
Caches: Basic Concepts, Mapping, Replacement, Multiple-Level Caches, Miss Rate Reduction, and Write Policy
Embedded I/O Systems: Embedded I/O, General Purpose I/O, Serial I/O, and Other Peripherals

Project Topics: Use Simulators Such as Ripes (https://github.com/mortbopet/Ripes) and GEM5 (https://www.gem5.org/) to Implement Components of Computer Systems Such as Various Cache Organizations, Solutions to Hazards, TLBs
